title: Bakchou arm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Bakchou arm''' was an area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region that contained [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]].

{{Sec-stub}}
